features.name: star_import_in_package_for_type_resolution
features.description: Code should include a star import statement (import pkgname::*;) inside a package definition to bring typedefs into package scope

features.name: struct_packed_with_cross_package_imported_type
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed that uses a type imported via star import from another package

features.name: module_using_struct_typedef_from_imported_package
features.description: Code should include a module that imports a package containing a struct typedef that uses cross-package imported types

features.name: explicit_scope_resolution_for_cross_package_typedef
features.description: Code should include explicit scope resolution (pkg::type) for cross-package typedefs as a workaround for import issues
